svg.title: Turns to resume after a context wipe: 5.0 with planning-with-files vs 13.3 for a raw agent (internal benchmark v1)
svg.text: After a context wipe, how many turns until the agent is back on track?
Internal benchmark v1 (Test 5, 2026-07-06) · author-run · harness-authored tasks · deterministic grading · forced-recovery task, T=3 per arm · lower is better
Session hard-stopped at ~50% done; fresh session told only "Continue the work in this directory." All arms finished (77/77 pytest-green); the difference is re-orientation cost.
Scale: 13.3 turns = full bar width. Full method, all seven arms measured, and disclosed limits: docs/evals.md (Test 5).
